bottom_line: Test-writing agents should prefix unused fixture variables with '_' and run 'uv run ruff format' before step-done to avoid lint/format fix cycles.
coverage_notes: Read all step self-reports (S01-S11). No raw run logs available (worktree at .worktrees/CR-00038 has no ai-dev/logs/). Fix-cycle prompts read in full. DB telemetry: full via iw item-status --json. Items S06 and S07 each had one fix cycle that passed on retry. All QV gates passed. Browser verification passed with manually seeded DB state.

findings.title: Lint gate S06 failed due to F841 errors in test file
findings.recommendation: Test-writing agents should prefix fixture variables that are created only for DB FK satisfaction and not read after creation with '_' (e.g., _doc = _make_project_doc(...)) to suppress F841.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add test-writing guidance to iw-execute skill: prefix DB fixture variables that are created only for FK satisfaction with '_' to suppress F841; analyzed in CR-00038 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00038/reports/CR-00038_self_assess_report.md). Target file: skills/iw-execute/SKILL.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Format gate S07 failed alongside lint
findings.recommendation: Test-writing agents should run 'uv run ruff format' before step-done to catch format-check failures before QV gates run.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add 'uv run ruff format' pre-step-done check to test-step agent instructions; analyzed in CR-00038 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00038/reports/CR-00038_self_assess_report.md). Target file: skills/iw-execute/SKILL.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S05 code review caught issues the test agent could have pre-empted
findings.recommendation: Add 'run lint and format-check before step-done' to test-step agent instructions to close the gap between self-verification and code-review handoff.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00038/reports/CR-00038_S05_CodeReview_Final_Report.md:129-132 — 'Run uv run ruff check --fix ... Run uv run ruff format' instructions in the code review report
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add lint/format-check pre-step-done instruction to test implementation guidance in design templates; analyzed in CR-00038 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00038/reports/CR-00038_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/Feature_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Browser verification S11 required manual DB seeding via docker exec
findings.recommendation: Provide a seed-data mechanism (SQL fixture file or SQLAlchemy fixture) for browser-verification steps that depend on live DB rows so agents don't need docker exec for seeding.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add SQL seed fixture support to browser verification step infrastructure so agents don't need docker exec to seed DB state; analyzed in CR-00038 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00038/reports/CR-00038_self_assess_report.md). Target file: skills/iw-execute/SKILL.md. Effort: M.
